title: Christmas Holiday and 2nd Anniversary Celebration – December 15th
excerpt: This Friday we are hosting the Friday Drop-In / ESC Christmas Party / ESC 2nd Club Anniversary! Make sure you come down for some Squash & festivities. Courts are booked from 4:30pm – 9pm. For the adults there will be some exciting squash surprises for all participants and there will be some games and activities … Read more
content:
This Friday we are hosting the Friday Drop-In / ESC Christmas Party / ESC 2nd Club Anniversary!

Make sure you come down for some Squash & festivities. Courts are booked from 4:30pm – 9pm. For the adults there will be some exciting squash surprises for all participants and there will be some games and activities for any children that would like to come down as well.
